title: eragrostis acutiflora
intro: Eragrostis acutiflora, also known as needle grass, is a species of grass native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis acutiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Eragrostis acutiflora is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its extracts have been used in various herbal preparations, including salves and poultices.
